original_image_tags: Faint, reversed ghost text from the reverse side of the page or a facing page is visible through the paper. It appears to be a typed letter or memo. The text is illegible due to bleed-through.

elements.description: A faint, mostly illegible watermark or seal of the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) is visible in the center. It features an eagle with spread wings, a shield on its chest, and a banner. Below the eagle, the text 'FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION' and 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE' is faintly visible. The watermark is partially obscured by several ink stamps.

judge.reason: Description A claims there is no visual content (only bleed-through text), while Description B claims there is an FBI watermark or seal, which is a direct contradiction on the presence of visual content.
